prompt: A split-screen versus-mode promotional banner. Left half deep purple with glowing '⚡ YOU' badge silhouette, right half hot pink with glowing '⚡ FRIEND' badge silhouette, a giant electric 'VS' centerpiece with lightning bolts. K-Pop arena spotlights, sparkle confetti, scoreboard frame. The whole thing reads as 'battle your friend over K-Pop chemistry'. No real-person likeness, no text other than the VS centerpiece if needed.
style: Arena scoreboard meets K-Pop concert poster
notes: Promo banner for VS Mode (key referral driver). Used as og:image on results page and as in-app teaser.
